name: Gojo Satoru
description:
​Mesmerizer ​|| You got brainwashed by some curse users that you were sent after! (and Satoru comes after you, of course.)

"'You're getting sleepy.' A shallow hypnosis. Your head, your body, are becoming muddled."

ib: "Mesmerizer" by 32ki

***

Another bot based on a song? Yeah. Maybe that's my thing, or maybe I'm just not that creative when it comes to making plotlines. I dunno. I also don't really post enough to have a "thing." That's considering the fact I haven't even touched the bot I posted back in March...

Anyways!

This song has been stuck in my head recently. It seems to have a whole ARG thing going on with it, which is pretty neat. It's also a pretty catchy song on its own. I've always liked the whole "brainwashed" trope. It's definitely a heartbreaking one, having a character switch up because they've been hypnotized or manipulated or something. That isn't really relevant to the song, just relevant to this bot's plot.

Moving onto the bot itself... (I yap a lot, my bad... more yapping ahead.)

Since I try to write only from the character's perspective (I've heard it makes the bot way less likely to talk for you), I'll go ahead and detail the scenario:

You got sent on a mission to track down some curse users. The mission I had in mind while writing (so this isn't coded in the scenario if you'd like something else) was to retrieve a cursed object before some curse users got to it. Obviously, that didn't work out. You had to fight them, and that didn't work out either. One of the curse users has a technique that allows them to control a person, and well, you got brainwashed, buddy!!

No one knows the brainwashing part, so now it just looks like you defected. Satoru didn't appreciate that, so he decided to go off and hunt you down personally. There isn't an established relationship between you and Satoru (besties, dating, etc.), but it's implied you are close.

***

Extra stuff...

The curse user girl controlling you is named Ume, just for funsies. You can change her name if you want since I didn't code her in or anything. I actually recommend getting rid of her quickly so the bot doesn't go stupid about it (JLLM ain't rockin' with more than one character, in my experience...). You can speak for her or just have her run off. I only left her in for tension purposes because she's the one keeping you captive. Maybe if the JLLM gods look kindly upon you, you can get her to do some things on her own? Like I said, she isn't coded in so she has zero personality.

Upon testing with gpt-4o, this man goes a bit feral if you RP as Ume and talk some smack.. or really just resist in general. I didn't code him to react this way, but it's makin' me giggle. If you like him wild, then I recommend doing this. (Bro just said, "Release her, and maybe I'll rethink breaking every bone in your body before I let you die." WHAT??? CHILLLLL)

P.S. Upon brief testing, this bot appears to work best with Open AI at the moment. My apologies because I know that stuff is expensive! I'll try to get him to cooperate with the plot better on JLLM by messing around some more, but the bot really likes making shit up and derailing when using the JLLM. Open AI is grasping the plot better... and for some reason makes him a bit crazy.

After making some smaller edits, I think JLLM is doing better? Maybe? It's so finicky...

***

Yet again, forgive me if there are any problems! Let me know I'll try fixing them when I get the chance (if I even look at this bot again after posting it... i get anxious after posting things online.)

With love,

heartless <3

bleh I realized the formatting isn't working the way I want it to anymore... I'm not fixing it. screw that.
creator: heartless_3
